title: Realistic Physicsmod Snow
body:
I've seen resourcepacks that make the snow less intrusive, but for my frozen wasteland horror-themed pack, 'less intrusive' wasn't what I was going for.

So, I made this. If you want thick but less pixilated snow textures with [Physicsmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod) particles, please enjoy (or not, I suppose, I'm not the boss of you).

For video, see the [Planetminecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/physicsmod-realistic-snow/) for this pack.
